prompt: Edit image 1: Apply a distinct X-ray style filter and blue tint from image 3 to the cell structures, focusing on internal details. Use the high-contrast binary shapes from image 2 as masks overlaid onto clusters of cells in image 1.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply a distinct X-ray style filter and blue tint, derived from image 3, to the cellular structures. This transformation should render the cellular structures transparent and skeletal, emphasizing their internal details in a manner consistent with an X-ray. Simultaneously, utilize the high-contrast white binary shapes from image 2 as precise spatial masks. Overlay these masks onto corresponding clusters of cells in image 1, ensuring the X-ray effect is predominantly applied and visible within the areas delineated by these white mask shapes.
objects: original green cellular structures with red internal details (in unmasked areas)
cellular structures with X-ray style filter, blue tint, transparent and skeletal appearance, and emphasized internal details (in masked areas)
